things.name: Old City of Sana'a (UNESCO)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage one of the oldest inhabited cities in the world - extraordinary multi-storey tower houses

things.name: Great Mosque of Sana'a
things.description: Founded 627 AD - one of the earliest mosques in the world, predating the Prophet Muhammad's death

things.name: Bab al-Yemen Gate
things.description: Ancient city gate - the main entrance to the old walled city

things.name: Al-Saleh Mosque
things.description: Massive modern mosque with a capacity for 44,000 worshippers - the largest in Yemen

things.name: Souq al-Milh (Salt Market)
things.description: Ancient covered market where each lane sells a different product - spices, silver, raisins

things.name: National Museum of Yemen
things.description: Pre-Islamic South Arabian civilisations - the Sabaean, Minaean and Himyarite kingdoms

things.name: Dar al-Hajar (Rock Palace)
things.description: Imam's summer palace perched on top of a volcanic rock pinnacle - the symbol of Yemen

things.name: Wadi Dhar Valley
things.description: Fertile valley of qat plantations with traditional tower houses clinging to cliff faces

things.name: Socotra Island
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage island with 300+ endemic species including the extraordinary Dragon Blood Tree

things.name: Saltah (National Stew)
things.description: Yemen's national dish - a bubbling stew of fenugreek froth, lamb, eggs and vegetables
